series_metadata.series_description: To provide a uniform means of collecting and recording statewide Computer Aided Dispatch (CAD) Tow Rotation Contractor Information. Per policy OSP-200.17, a written request must be submitted to the facility commander/manager before any wrecker company is placed on the facility wrecker list. A new request must be filed with the post commander annually in July for a towing company to remain on the list.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in file at post/section for the life of tow contract, plus two years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in electronic file at the post/section for the life of tow contract, plus two years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
